Plugin.name: ComplexPricingEngine

Parameter.name: UserExitId
Parameter.description: Id of User Exit as defined in Calculation Schema

Parameter.name: ProductAttributes
Parameter.description: Attributes of current item (If header step, dictionary of all items)

Return.name: SkipCalcStep
Return.description: Boolean flag is step should be skipped

Parameter.name: UserExitId
Parameter.description: Id of User Exit as defined in Calculation Schema

Parameter.name: ProductAttributes
Parameter.description: Attributes of current item (If header step, dictionary of all items)

Return.name: ModifiedBases
Return.description: Object which includes modified CalculationBase and modfied ScaleBase

Parameter.name: UserExitId
Parameter.description: Id of User Exit as defined in Calculation Schema

Parameter.name: ProductAttributes
Parameter.description: Attributes of current item (If header step, dictionary of all items)

Return.name: AffectedResults
Return.description: Object which contains affected results of calculation

Parameter.name: UserExitId
Parameter.description: Id of User Exit as defined in Calculation Schema

Parameter.name: ProductAttributes
Parameter.description: Attributes of current item (If header step, dictionary of all items)

Return.name: SkipSearchStep
Return.description: Defines if current SearchStrategy Step should be skiped
